major_tropes: The Fated Mate / Bond That Cannot Be Denied
The Supernatural World Hidden in Plain Sight
The Forbidden Love Across Species or Factions
The Heroine Who Does Not Know What She Is
plot_template: A human (or half-aware supernatural) is pulled into a hidden world by an encounter with a powerful supernatural being. A bond or prophecy connects them despite faction rules, past trauma, and power imbalances. They must choose between the world they knew and the world they belong to — and between the love that costs everything and the safety that requires nothing.
character_archetypes: The Powerful Supernatural Who Is Undone By This One Person
The Heroine Who Is Stronger Than She Knows
The Rival Who Has a Legitimate Claim
The Elder/Council Who Enforces The Rules They Break
world_building_notes: The supernatural world must have internal rules, politics, and factions that create real obstacles. The bond or fated mate trope must be complicated by genuine character agency — neither party can simply accept it without internal conflict. Power imbalance must be addressed, not ignored.
emotional_core: Belonging, transformation, the terror of being truly known, love that defies the natural order
